title: Figure 6 in A novel rapid visual detection assay for Toxoplasma gondii combining recombinase-aided amplification and lateral flow dipstick coupled with CRISPR-Cas13a fluorescence (RAA-Cas13a-LFD)
author: Zhao, Jinhong
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 6. Sensitivity of T. gondii detection by RAA-Cas13a-LFD and qPCR assay. (A) Visual inspection of RAA-Cas13a-LFD. (B) Curves for qPCR. Strip and curves: 1–10: plasmid copy number diluted to 1 ng/µL–1 × 10—9 ng/µL, respectively; NTC: negative control (ddH O).
steps_raw: Figure 6. Sensitivity of T. gondii detection by RAA-Cas13a-LFD and qPCR assay. (A) Visual inspection of RAA-Cas13a-LFD. (B) Curves for qPCR. Strip and curves: 1–10: plasmid copy number diluted to 1 ng/µL–1 × 10—9 ng/µL, respectively; NTC: negative control (ddH O).
